title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 34–39, this part focuses on Unknown person #33, Unknown person #34, Unknown person #35, Unknown person #36, Law as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Hey, did you see fire fist earlier?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear their duels aren't completely one-sided anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's using his observer- vision haki to carefully place his attacks where I'm going to move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: That's a skillful technique you got, shot-nose.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Leaning too hard on part of Haki you're best at, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You gotta expand the reach of your abilities.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll use the force of the coldest flames you can manage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll use the force of my flames to acccele- rate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for your re- ference, he's on his 46th loss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zehahaha! So many tries and he hasn't even gotten pops to use his devil fruit ability!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
